name: the full-surface grounding CTP emits covers every namespace (42 code + cloud-conventions) and the IaC rules
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --emit-grounding 2>/dev/null > g.json; node -e 'const g=require("./g.json");process.exit(g.grounded_namespaces.length>=43 && g.grounded_namespaces.includes("cloud-conventions") && g.iac_rules>=22 ?0:1)' && echo grounding-covers-all 1>&2
